---
title: "SSWEEEP_proj_3_23_26"
format: html
---

#### Libraries:

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(sf)
library(terra)
library(readxl)
library(leaflet)
library(htmltools)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
library(ranger)
library(randomForest)
library(purrr)
library(reshape2)
library(vegan)
library(mgcv)
library(broom)
```

```{r data_import, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# raw data
weed_id_tax <- read_excel("../data/SSWEEP_data_with_tax_and_indices_02_2026.xlsx", sheet = "SSWEEP")
weed_idx    <- read_excel("../data/SSWEEP_data_with_tax_and_indices_02_2026.xlsx", sheet = "Calculations for each grid")
weed_id     <- read_csv("../data/SSWEEP_weed_id_count_data.csv")
surface_sampling <- read_csv("../data/SSWEEP_surface_SP_samples.csv")

# known correction:
# pedology_lab_id 240683 was mislabeled as 136J and should be 124J
surface_sampling <- surface_sampling %>%
  mutate(
    row_num = as.character(row_num),
    row_num = if_else(pedology_lab_id == 240683, "124J", row_num)
  )

# optional raster covariates
current_dist <- rast("../data/disturbance/currently_dist_binary.tif")
covariates   <- rast("../data/covars/covariate_stack_3m.tif")
names(covariates) <- make.names(names(covariates))
```

```{r}
weed_id_tax <- weed_id_tax %>%
  select(1:143) %>%
  slice(1:72)

weed_id_long <- weed_id_tax %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c("Common Name", "Genus", "Species", "Family", "Life Cycle", "Season", "Type"),
    names_to = "row_num",
    values_to = "weed_count"
  ) %>%
  rename(
    weed_species = `Common Name`,
    genus = Genus,
    species = Species,
    family = Family,
    life_cycle = `Life Cycle`,
    season = Season,
    type = Type
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    row_num = as.character(row_num),
    weed_count = as.numeric(weed_count)
  )

surface_sampling_weed <- surface_sampling %>%
  mutate(row_num = as.character(row_num)) %>%
  left_join(weed_id_long, by = "row_num")
```
```{r}
ssweep <- read_excel("../data/SSWEEP_data_with_tax_and_indices_02_2026.xlsx", sheet = "SSWEEP")

grid_cols <- names(ssweep)[str_detect(names(ssweep), "^\\d+[A-Za-z]+$")]

idx_rows <- c(
  "Simpson's diversity index",
  "Shannon Weiner diversity index",
  "Pielou's evenness index",
  "Berger-Parker dominance index"
)

idx_by_point <- ssweep %>%
  filter(`Common Name` %in% idx_rows) %>%
  mutate(idx_name = make_clean_names(`Common Name`)) %>%
  mutate(idx_name = make.unique(idx_name)) %>%
  select(idx_name, all_of(grid_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(grid_cols), names_to = "row_num", values_to = "value") %>%
  mutate(
    row_num = as.character(row_num),
    value = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = idx_name, values_from = value) %>%
  clean_names()

surface_sampling_idx <- surface_sampling %>%
  mutate(row_num = as.character(row_num)) %>%
  left_join(idx_by_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(-berger_parker_dominance_index) %>%
  rename(berger_parker_dominance_index = berger_parker_dominance_index_2)

surface_sampling %>%
  count(row_num, sort = TRUE) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

surface_sampling_idx %>%
  count(row_num, sort = TRUE) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

surface_sampling %>%
  filter(row_num %in% c("124J", "136J")) %>%
  arrange(row_num, pedology_lab_id)

surface_sampling_idx %>%
  filter(row_num %in% c("124J", "136J")) %>%
  arrange(row_num, pedology_lab_id)
```


```{r}
soil_vars <- c("lbc", "lbc_eq", "p_h_2", "ca", "k", "mg", "mn", "p", "zn")

lev <- levels(current_dist)[[1]]
id_col <- names(lev)[1]
yes_id <- lev[[id_col]][lev$CurrentDis == "Yes"]

current_dist_bin <- ifel(current_dist == yes_id, 1, 0)
names(current_dist_bin) <- "dist_current"

target <- ifel(current_dist_bin == 1, 1, NA)
dist_to_dist <- distance(target)
names(dist_to_dist) <- "dist_to_current_m"

soil_pts_ll <- surface_sampling %>%
  select(row_num, x, y, all_of(soil_vars)) %>%
  mutate(row_num = as.character(row_num)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = 4326)

soil_pts_utm <- st_transform(soil_pts_ll, crs(current_dist_bin))

coord_lookup <- soil_pts_utm %>%
  mutate(
    x_utm = st_coordinates(geometry)[,1],
    y_utm = st_coordinates(geometry)[,2]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(row_num, x_utm, y_utm)

dist_vals  <- terra::extract(current_dist_bin, vect(soil_pts_utm)) %>% select(-ID)
dist_dvals <- terra::extract(dist_to_dist, vect(soil_pts_utm)) %>% select(-ID)

soil_dist <- soil_pts_utm %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  bind_cols(dist_vals, dist_dvals) %>%
  clean_names()

point_base <- soil_dist %>%
  mutate(row_num = as.character(row_num))
```

```{r}
soil_pts_cov <- terra::extract(covariates, vect(soil_pts_utm), bind = TRUE) %>%
  st_as_sf()

soil_pts_cov_df <- soil_pts_cov %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(row_num = as.character(row_num))

candidate_covars <- c(
  "elevation", "dem", "slope", "aspect", "twi", "ndvi",
  "spi", "tri", "roughness", "curvature",
  "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
  "topographic_position_index",
  "flow_accumulation_usgs",
  "stream_power_index",
  "vertical_distance_to_channel_network",
  "ndvi_sept_2022"
)

covar_vars <- intersect(candidate_covars, names(soil_pts_cov_df))
```



```{r}
weed_trait_long <- surface_sampling_weed %>%
  transmute(
    row_num      = as.character(row_num),
    weed_species = str_squish(as.character(weed_species)),
    family       = str_squish(as.character(family)),
    genus        = str_squish(as.character(genus)),
    species      = str_squish(as.character(species)),
    life_cycle   = str_squish(as.character(life_cycle)),
    season       = str_squish(as.character(season)),
    type         = str_squish(as.character(type)),
    weed_count   = as.numeric(weed_count)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  mutate(
    life_cycle = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(life_cycle), "annual") ~ "Annual",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(life_cycle), "perennial") ~ "Perennial",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    type = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(type), "broad") ~ "Broadleaf",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(type), "grass") ~ "Grass",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(type), "sedge") ~ "Sedge",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    season = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_lower(season), "summer") & str_detect(str_to_lower(season), "winter") ~ "Warm/Cool",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(season), "summer") ~ "Warm",
      str_detect(str_to_lower(season), "winter") ~ "Cool",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

weed_point_summary <- weed_trait_long %>%
  group_by(row_num) %>%
  summarise(
    weed_total_abundance  = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    weed_species_richness = sum(weed_count > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    weed_family_richness  = n_distinct(family[weed_count > 0]),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

life_cycle_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_cycle)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, life_cycle) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = life_cycle, values_from = abund, values_fill = 0, names_prefix = "life_")

type_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(type)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, type) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = abund, values_fill = 0, names_prefix = "type_")

season_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(season)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, season) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = season, values_from = abund, values_fill = 0, names_prefix = "season_")

stacked_trait_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  mutate(
    stacked_trait = case_when(
      !is.na(life_cycle) & !is.na(type) ~ paste(life_cycle, type, sep = "_"),
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(stacked_trait)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, stacked_trait) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stacked_trait, values_from = abund, values_fill = 0, names_prefix = "trait_")

weed_traits_point <- weed_point_summary %>%
  left_join(life_cycle_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(type_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(season_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(stacked_trait_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  clean_names()
```

```{r}
idx_keep <- surface_sampling_idx %>%
  mutate(row_num = as.character(row_num)) %>%
  select(
    row_num,
    simpsons_diversity_index,
    shannon_weiner_diversity_index,
    pielous_evenness_index,
    berger_parker_dominance_index
  )

point_env <- point_base %>%
  left_join(coord_lookup, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(soil_pts_cov_df %>% select(row_num, any_of(covar_vars)), by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(idx_keep, by = "row_num") %>%
  select(
    row_num,
    x_utm,
    y_utm,
    dist_current,
    dist_to_current_m,
    any_of(soil_vars),
    any_of(covar_vars),
    simpsons_diversity_index,
    shannon_weiner_diversity_index,
    pielous_evenness_index,
    berger_parker_dominance_index
  )

analysis_dat <- point_env %>%
  left_join(weed_traits_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(dist_current = as.factor(dist_current))
```
```{r}
weed_family_long <- weed_trait_long %>%
  transmute(
    row_num = as.character(row_num),
    family = str_squish(family),
    weed_count = as.numeric(weed_count)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0, !is.na(family), family != "")

point_totals <- weed_family_long %>%
  group_by(row_num) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

family_point <- weed_family_long %>%
  group_by(row_num, family) %>%
  summarise(family_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(point_totals, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(family_prop = family_abundance / total_abundance)

family_point_dist <- family_point %>%
  left_join(point_env %>% select(row_num, dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm), by = "row_num") %>%
  filter(!is.na(dist_to_current_m), !is.na(x_utm), !is.na(y_utm), total_abundance >= 3)

family_env_dat <- family_point_dist %>%
  left_join(
    point_env %>% select(row_num, dist_current, dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm, any_of(soil_vars), any_of(covar_vars)),
    by = c("row_num", "dist_to_current_m", "x_utm", "y_utm")
  ) %>%
  mutate(other_abundance = total_abundance - family_abundance)
```
```{r}
candidate_predictors <- c(
  "dist_to_current_m",
  "dist_current",
  "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
  "elevation",
  "slope",
  "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
  "topographic_position_index",
  "flow_accumulation_usgs",
  "stream_power_index",
  "vertical_distance_to_channel_network",
  "ndvi_sept_2022"
)

candidate_predictors <- intersect(candidate_predictors, names(family_env_dat))

# numeric-only correlation check
num_preds <- family_env_dat %>%
  select(any_of(candidate_predictors)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.x))))

cor_mat <- cor(num_preds, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "spearman")
round(cor_mat, 2)

model_predictors <- c(
  "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg",
  "elevation", "slope",
  "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
  "flow_accumulation_usgs",
  "ndvi_sept_2022"
)

model_predictors <- intersect(model_predictors, names(family_env_dat))

fit_family_env_gam <- function(d, fam_name, predictors) {

  keep_vars <- c(
    "family_abundance", "other_abundance",
    "dist_to_current_m", "x_utm", "y_utm",
    predictors
  )

  d2 <- d %>%
    select(any_of(keep_vars)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
    drop_na()

  if (nrow(d2) < 30) {
    return(list(
      smooth = tibble(
        family = fam_name,
        n = nrow(d2),
        dev_exp_env = NA_real_,
        dev_exp_env_space = NA_real_,
        edf_dist = NA_real_,
        p_dist = NA_real_,
        edf_space = NA_real_,
        p_space = NA_real_
      ),
      param = tibble(
        family = character(),
        term = character(),
        estimate = numeric(),
        std.error = numeric(),
        statistic = numeric(),
        p.value = numeric()
      )
    ))
  }

  rhs_env <- paste(
    c("s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)", predictors),
    collapse = " + "
  )

  rhs_env_space <- paste(
    c("s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)", predictors, "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"),
    collapse = " + "
  )

  f_env <- as.formula(
    paste("cbind(family_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_env)
  )

  f_env_space <- as.formula(
    paste("cbind(family_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_env_space)
  )

  m_env <- gam(
    f_env,
    data = d2,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  m_env_space <- gam(
    f_env_space,
    data = d2,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  sm_env <- summary(m_env)
  sm_env_space <- summary(m_env_space)

  param_tab <- broom::tidy(m_env_space) %>%
    filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
    mutate(family = fam_name)

  smooth_tab <- tibble(
    family = fam_name,
    n = nrow(d2),
    dev_exp_env = sm_env$dev.expl,
    dev_exp_env_space = sm_env_space$dev.expl,
    edf_dist = sm_env_space$s.table[1, "edf"],
    p_dist = sm_env_space$s.table[1, "p-value"],
    edf_space = sm_env_space$s.table[nrow(sm_env_space$s.table), "edf"],
    p_space = sm_env_space$s.table[nrow(sm_env_space$s.table), "p-value"]
  )

  list(
    smooth = smooth_tab,
    param = param_tab
  )
}

top_fams <- family_env_dat %>%
  group_by(family) %>%
  summarise(total_family_abundance = sum(family_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  slice_max(total_family_abundance, n = 6) %>%
  pull(family)

family_env_top <- family_env_dat %>%
  filter(family %in% top_fams)

env_results_list <- family_env_top %>%
  group_split(family) %>%
  map(~ fit_family_env_gam(
    d = .x,
    fam_name = unique(.x$family),
    predictors = model_predictors
  ))

family_env_smooth <- map_dfr(env_results_list, "smooth") %>%
  mutate(
    p_dist_bh = p.adjust(p_dist, method = "BH"),
    p_space_bh = p.adjust(p_space, method = "BH"),
    nonlinear_dist = edf_dist > 1
  )

family_env_param <- map_dfr(env_results_list, "param") %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(p_adj_bh = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH")) %>%
  ungroup()

family_env_smooth
family_env_param
```

```{r}
# optional: only run if you want the diversity leaflet map
idx_sf <- st_as_sf(surface_sampling_idx, coords = c("x","y"), crs = 4326)

idx_cols <- names(idx_sf) %>%
  keep(~ str_detect(.x, "simpson|shannon|pielou|evenness|berger|parker|dominance"))

idx_cols <- idx_cols[idx_cols %in% c(
  "simpsons_diversity_index",
  "shannon_weiner_diversity_index",
  "pielous_evenness_index",
  "berger_parker_dominance_index"
)]

popup_all <- purrr::pmap_chr(
  idx_sf %>% st_drop_geometry() %>% select(row_num, all_of(idx_cols)),
  function(...) {
    r <- list(...)
    rn <- r$row_num
    r$row_num <- NULL

    lines <- purrr::imap_chr(r, \(v, nm) {
      if (is.null(v) || is.na(v)) return(paste0("<b>", nm, ":</b> NA"))
      paste0("<b>", nm, ":</b> ", round(as.numeric(v), 4))
    })

    paste0("<b>Row:</b> ", rn, "<br>", paste(lines, collapse = "<br>"))
  }
)

coords <- st_coordinates(idx_sf)

m <- leaflet(idx_sf) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldImagery, group = "Imagery") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron, group = "Light")

for (col in idx_cols) {
  pal <- colorNumeric("viridis", domain = idx_sf[[col]], na.color = "transparent")

  m <- m %>%
    addCircleMarkers(
      lng = coords[,1], lat = coords[,2],
      radius = 7,
      stroke = TRUE, weight = 1, color = "white",
      fillColor = pal(idx_sf[[col]]),
      fillOpacity = 0.9,
      popup = popup_all,
      group = col
    ) %>%
    addLegend(
      position = "bottomright",
      pal = pal,
      values = idx_sf[[col]],
      title = col,
      group = col
    )
}

m %>%
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c("Imagery", "Light"),
    overlayGroups = idx_cols,
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  hideGroup(idx_cols[-1])
```
```{r optional-cyperaceae-followup, eval=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(patchwork)

#-----------------------------
# Cyperaceae subset
#-----------------------------
cyper_dat <- family_env_dat %>%
  filter(family == "Cyperaceae") %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(
      family_abundance, other_abundance, total_abundance,
      dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm,
      any_of(model_predictors)
    ), as.numeric),
    family_prop = family_abundance / total_abundance
  ) %>%
  drop_na(
    family_abundance, other_abundance, total_abundance,
    dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm
  )

# quick check: are distance and wetness correlated?
cyper_dat %>%
  summarise(
    rho = cor(
      dist_to_current_m,
      topographic_wetness_index_usgs,
      method = "spearman",
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
    )
  )

#-----------------------------
# fit Cyperaceae model
#-----------------------------
cyper_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg",
    "elevation", "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(cyper_dat)
)

if (nrow(cyper_dat) >= 30) {

  cyper_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "cbind(family_abundance, other_abundance) ~",
      paste(
        c(
          "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
          cyper_preds,
          "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
        ),
        collapse = " + "
      )
    )
  )

  cyperaceae_mod <- gam(
    cyper_formula,
    data = cyper_dat,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  cyper_sum <- summary(cyperaceae_mod)

  #-----------------------------
  # helper: partial prediction
  #-----------------------------
  make_partial_pred <- function(mod, dat, focal_var, grid_n = 200) {
    newdat <- dat[rep(1, grid_n), , drop = FALSE]

    # hold numeric predictors constant at medians
    for (nm in names(newdat)) {
      if (is.numeric(newdat[[nm]])) {
        newdat[[nm]] <- median(dat[[nm]], na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    }

    # vary focal predictor across observed range
    newdat[[focal_var]] <- seq(
      min(dat[[focal_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      max(dat[[focal_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      length.out = grid_n
    )

    pr <- predict(mod, newdata = newdat, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

    tibble(
      x = newdat[[focal_var]],
      fit = plogis(pr$fit),
      lower = plogis(pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
      upper = plogis(pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
      variable = focal_var
    )
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # build plotting data
  #-----------------------------
  cyper_plot_raw <- cyper_dat

  cyper_dist_pred <- make_partial_pred(cyperaceae_mod, cyper_dat, "dist_to_current_m")
  cyper_twi_pred  <- make_partial_pred(cyperaceae_mod, cyper_dat, "topographic_wetness_index_usgs")

  # extract edf/p values from smooth table safely
  smooth_terms <- rownames(cyper_sum$s.table)

  dist_row <- which(str_detect(smooth_terms, "dist_to_current_m"))
  twi_row  <- which(str_detect(smooth_terms, "topographic_wetness_index_usgs"))

  dist_lab <- if (length(dist_row) == 1) {
    paste0(
      "edf = ", round(cyper_sum$s.table[dist_row, "edf"], 2),
      "\np = ", signif(cyper_sum$s.table[dist_row, "p-value"], 3)
    )
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  twi_lab <- if (length(twi_row) == 1) {
    paste0(
      "edf = ", round(cyper_sum$s.table[twi_row, "edf"], 2),
      "\np = ", signif(cyper_sum$s.table[twi_row, "p-value"], 3)
    )
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # common theme
  #-----------------------------
  theme_cyper <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0),
      legend.position = "none"
    )

  #-----------------------------
  # panel 1: distance effect
  #-----------------------------
  p_dist <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = cyper_plot_raw,
      aes(x = dist_to_current_m, y = family_prop),
      alpha = 0.18,
      size = 1.8
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = cyper_dist_pred,
      aes(x = x, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      alpha = 0.22
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = cyper_dist_pred,
      aes(x = x, y = fit),
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, NA),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Distance to disturbance",
      x = "Distance to disturbance (m)",
      y = "Predicted Cyperaceae proportion"
    ) +
    theme_cyper

  if (!is.null(dist_lab)) {
    p_dist <- p_dist +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = dist_lab,
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4, size = 4
      )
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # panel 2: wetness effect
  #-----------------------------
  p_twi <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = cyper_plot_raw,
      aes(x = topographic_wetness_index_usgs, y = family_prop),
      alpha = 0.18,
      size = 1.8
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = cyper_twi_pred,
      aes(x = x, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      alpha = 0.22
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = cyper_twi_pred,
      aes(x = x, y = fit),
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, NA),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Topographic wetness",
      x = "Topographic Wetness Index",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_cyper

  if (!is.null(twi_lab)) {
    p_twi <- p_twi +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = twi_lab,
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4, size = 4
      )
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # combine panels
  #-----------------------------
  cyper_fig <- p_dist + p_twi +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Adjusted partial effects for Cyperaceae",
      subtitle = paste(
        "Lines show model-predicted Cyperaceae proportion from the spatial GAM;",
        "other covariates held at typical values."
      ),
      caption = paste(
        "Points are raw observed proportions for context only.",
        "Shaded ribbons show 95% confidence intervals."
      )
    )

  cyper_fig
}
```
#### summaries:

```{r}
family_summary <- weed_trait_long %>%
  group_by(family) %>%
  summarise(
    total_weed_count = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_points_present = n_distinct(row_num[weed_count > 0]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_weed_count))

genus_summary <- weed_trait_long %>%
  group_by(genus) %>%
  summarise(
    total_weed_count = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_points_present = n_distinct(row_num[weed_count > 0]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_weed_count))

life_cycle_summary <- weed_trait_long %>%
  group_by(life_cycle) %>%
  summarise(
    total_weed_count = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_points_present = n_distinct(row_num[weed_count > 0]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_weed_count))

season_summary <- weed_trait_long %>%
  group_by(season) %>%
  summarise(
    total_weed_count = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_points_present = n_distinct(row_num[weed_count > 0]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_weed_count))

type_summary <- weed_trait_long %>%
  group_by(type) %>%
  summarise(
    total_weed_count = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_points_present = n_distinct(row_num[weed_count > 0]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_weed_count))

family_summary
genus_summary
life_cycle_summary
season_summary
type_summary

```

```{r optional-sedge-followup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(patchwork)

#-----------------------------
# Build sedge point-level table
#-----------------------------
type_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(type), type != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, type) %>%
  summarise(type_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

point_totals_type <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sedge_dat <- type_point %>%
  filter(type == "Sedge") %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(point_env, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(
    sedge_abundance = as.numeric(type_abundance),
    other_abundance = as.numeric(total_abundance - type_abundance),
    sedge_prop = sedge_abundance / total_abundance
  ) %>%
  filter(
    total_abundance >= 3,
    !is.na(dist_to_current_m),
    !is.na(x_utm),
    !is.na(y_utm)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(
      sedge_abundance, other_abundance, total_abundance,
      dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm,
      any_of(model_predictors)
    ), as.numeric)
  )

#-----------------------------
# quick check: are distance and wetness correlated?
#-----------------------------
sedge_dat %>%
  summarise(
    rho = cor(
      dist_to_current_m,
      topographic_wetness_index_usgs,
      method = "spearman",
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
    )
  )

#-----------------------------
# fit sedge model
#-----------------------------
sedge_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg",
    "elevation", "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(sedge_dat)
)

if (nrow(sedge_dat) >= 30) {

  sedge_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~",
      paste(
        c(
          "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
          sedge_preds,
          "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
        ),
        collapse = " + "
      )
    )
  )

  sedge_mod <- gam(
    sedge_formula,
    data = sedge_dat,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  sedge_sum <- summary(sedge_mod)

  #-----------------------------
  # helper: partial prediction
  #-----------------------------
  make_partial_pred <- function(mod, dat, focal_var, grid_n = 200) {
    newdat <- dat[rep(1, grid_n), , drop = FALSE]

    for (nm in names(newdat)) {
      if (is.numeric(newdat[[nm]])) {
        newdat[[nm]] <- median(dat[[nm]], na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    }

    newdat[[focal_var]] <- seq(
      min(dat[[focal_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      max(dat[[focal_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
      length.out = grid_n
    )

    pr <- predict(mod, newdata = newdat, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

    tibble(
      x = newdat[[focal_var]],
      fit = plogis(pr$fit),
      lower = plogis(pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
      upper = plogis(pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
      variable = focal_var
    )
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # build plotting data
  #-----------------------------
  sedge_plot_raw <- sedge_dat

  sedge_dist_pred <- make_partial_pred(sedge_mod, sedge_dat, "dist_to_current_m")
  sedge_twi_pred  <- make_partial_pred(sedge_mod, sedge_dat, "topographic_wetness_index_usgs")

  #-----------------------------
  # extract labels from smooth table
  #-----------------------------
  smooth_terms <- rownames(sedge_sum$s.table)

  dist_row <- which(str_detect(smooth_terms, "dist_to_current_m"))
  twi_row  <- which(str_detect(smooth_terms, "topographic_wetness_index_usgs"))

  dist_lab <- if (length(dist_row) == 1) {
    paste0(
      "edf = ", round(sedge_sum$s.table[dist_row, "edf"], 2),
      "\np = ", signif(sedge_sum$s.table[dist_row, "p-value"], 3)
    )
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  twi_lab <- if (length(twi_row) == 1) {
    paste0(
      "edf = ", round(sedge_sum$s.table[twi_row, "edf"], 2),
      "\np = ", signif(sedge_sum$s.table[twi_row, "p-value"], 3)
    )
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # theme
  #-----------------------------
  theme_sedge <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
      plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0),
      legend.position = "none"
    )

  #-----------------------------
  # panel 1: distance
  #-----------------------------
  p_dist_sedge <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = sedge_plot_raw,
      aes(x = dist_to_current_m, y = sedge_prop),
      alpha = 0.15,
      size = 1.5,
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.8, height = 0.003)
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = sedge_dist_pred,
      aes(x = x, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      alpha = 0.22
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = sedge_dist_pred,
      aes(x = x, y = fit),
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, NA),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Distance to disturbance",
      x = "Distance to disturbance (m)",
      y = "Predicted sedge proportion"
    ) +
    theme_sedge

  if (!is.null(dist_lab)) {
    p_dist_sedge <- p_dist_sedge +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = dist_lab,
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4, size = 4
      )
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # panel 2: wetness
  #-----------------------------
  p_twi_sedge <- ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      data = sedge_plot_raw,
      aes(x = topographic_wetness_index_usgs, y = sedge_prop),
      alpha = 0.15,
      size = 1.5,
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.03, height = 0.003)
    ) +
    geom_ribbon(
      data = sedge_twi_pred,
      aes(x = x, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
      alpha = 0.22
    ) +
    geom_line(
      data = sedge_twi_pred,
      aes(x = x, y = fit),
      linewidth = 1.1
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, NA),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Topographic wetness",
      x = "Topographic Wetness Index",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_sedge

  if (!is.null(twi_lab)) {
    p_twi_sedge <- p_twi_sedge +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x = Inf, y = Inf,
        label = twi_lab,
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4, size = 4
      )
  }

  #-----------------------------
  # combine panels
  #-----------------------------
  sedge_fig <- p_dist_sedge + p_twi_sedge +
    plot_annotation(
      title = "Adjusted partial effects for sedges",
      subtitle = paste(
        "Lines show model-predicted sedge proportion from the spatial GAM;",
        "other covariates held at typical values."
      ),
      caption = paste(
        "Points are raw observed proportions for context only.",
        "Shaded ribbons show 95% confidence intervals."
      )
    )

  sedge_fig
}

```

```{r}
#-----------------------------------
# nested sedge models
#-----------------------------------
sedge_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg",
    "elevation", "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(sedge_dat)
)

rhs_dist <- "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)"
rhs_space <- "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
rhs_covars <- paste(sedge_preds, collapse = " + ")

f_sedge_1 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist)
)

f_sedge_2 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_sedge_3 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars)
)

f_sedge_4 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_sedge_5 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_covars, "+", rhs_space)
)

m_sedge_1 <- gam(f_sedge_1, data = sedge_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_sedge_2 <- gam(f_sedge_2, data = sedge_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_sedge_3 <- gam(f_sedge_3, data = sedge_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_sedge_4 <- gam(f_sedge_4, data = sedge_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_sedge_5 <- gam(f_sedge_5, data = sedge_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")

extract_dist_info <- function(mod, model_name) {
  sm <- summary(mod)
  s_tab <- as.data.frame(sm$s.table)
  s_tab$term <- rownames(s_tab)

  dist_row <- s_tab %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "dist_to_current_m"))

  tibble(
    model = model_name,
    n = nrow(mod$model),
    dev_expl = sm$dev.expl,
    dist_edf = if (nrow(dist_row) > 0) dist_row$edf[1] else NA_real_,
    dist_p = if (nrow(dist_row) > 0) dist_row$`p-value`[1] else NA_real_
  )
}

sedge_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  extract_dist_info(m_sedge_1, "distance only"),
  extract_dist_info(m_sedge_2, "distance + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_sedge_3, "distance + covariates"),
  extract_dist_info(m_sedge_4, "distance + covariates + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_sedge_5, "covariates + space (no distance)")
)

sedge_model_summary


#For sedges, distance to disturbance was not significant in a univariate model and remained non-significant when only environmental covariates were included. However, after accounting for spatial structure, distance to disturbance became a significant nonlinear predictor of sedge abundance proportion (edf = 1.98, p = 0.007), and inclusion of the distance smooth increased deviance explained from 57.4% to 66.9%. This suggests that the sedge–disturbance relationship is spatially structured and not evident as a simple marginal trend. In the full model, Ca was negatively associated with sedge proportion, while Mg and September NDVI were positively associated.
```

```{r}
# full sedge model already exists:
# sedge_mod

full_dev <- summary(sedge_mod)$dev.expl

drop_one_term_sedge <- function(term_to_drop, dat, sedge_preds) {

  base_terms <- c(
    "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
    sedge_preds,
    "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
  )

  keep_terms <- base_terms[base_terms != term_to_drop]

  f_drop <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "cbind(sedge_abundance, other_abundance) ~",
      paste(keep_terms, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  mod_drop <- gam(
    f_drop,
    data = dat,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  tibble(
    dropped_term = term_to_drop,
    dev_expl_drop = summary(mod_drop)$dev.expl
  )
}

terms_to_test <- c(
  "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
  sedge_preds,
  "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
)

sedge_drop_importance <- map_dfr(
  terms_to_test,
  ~ drop_one_term_sedge(.x, sedge_dat, sedge_preds)
) %>%
  mutate(
    full_dev_expl = full_dev,
    delta_dev_expl = full_dev_expl - dev_expl_drop,
    term_label = case_when(
      dropped_term == "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)" ~ "Distance to disturbance",
      dropped_term == "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)" ~ "Spatial smooth",
      dropped_term == "p_h_2" ~ "pH",
      dropped_term == "p" ~ "P",
      dropped_term == "k" ~ "K",
      dropped_term == "ca" ~ "Ca",
      dropped_term == "mg" ~ "Mg",
      dropped_term == "elevation" ~ "Elevation",
      dropped_term == "slope" ~ "Slope",
      dropped_term == "topographic_wetness_index_usgs" ~ "Topographic wetness",
      dropped_term == "flow_accumulation_usgs" ~ "Flow accumulation",
      dropped_term == "ndvi_sept_2022" ~ "NDVI (Sept 2022)",
      TRUE ~ dropped_term
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(delta_dev_expl))

sedge_drop_importance
ggplot(
  sedge_drop_importance,
  aes(x = reorder(term_label, delta_dev_expl), y = delta_dev_expl)
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Unique contribution of predictors in the full sedge GAM",
    subtitle = "Bars show the drop in deviance explained when each term is removed from the full model",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Decrease in deviance explained"
  )

#Variable-drop comparisons indicated that the largest unique contribution to sedge abundance proportion came from the spatial smooth, followed by distance to disturbance. Among measured covariates, Ca and September NDVI contributed the most unique explanatory power, with smaller contributions from Mg and flow accumulation. Slope and topographic wetness index contributed little to no unique variation in the full model.
```

```{r}
full_trait_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
    "elevation",
    "slope",
    "aspect",
    "curvature",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "topographic_position_index",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "stream_power_index",
    "vertical_distance_to_channel_network",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(point_env)
)

library(patchwork)

#-----------------------------
# build broadleaf point table
#-----------------------------
type_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(type), type != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, type) %>%
  summarise(type_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

point_totals_type <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

broadleaf_dat <- type_point %>%
  filter(type == "Broadleaf") %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(point_env, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(
    broadleaf_abundance = as.numeric(type_abundance),
    other_abundance = as.numeric(total_abundance - type_abundance),
    broadleaf_prop = broadleaf_abundance / total_abundance
  ) %>%
  filter(
    total_abundance >= 3,
    !is.na(dist_to_current_m),
    !is.na(x_utm),
    !is.na(y_utm)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(
      broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance, total_abundance,
      dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm,
      any_of(full_trait_preds)
    ), as.numeric)
  )

# optional correlation check
broadleaf_dat %>%
  summarise(
    rho = cor(
      dist_to_current_m,
      topographic_wetness_index_usgs,
      method = "spearman",
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
    )
  )

#-----------------------------
# fit broadleaf GAMs
#-----------------------------
broadleaf_preds <- intersect(full_trait_preds, names(broadleaf_dat))

rhs_dist <- "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)"
rhs_space <- "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
rhs_covars <- paste(broadleaf_preds, collapse = " + ")

f_broadleaf_1 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist)
)

f_broadleaf_2 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_broadleaf_3 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars)
)

f_broadleaf_4 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_broadleaf_5 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_covars, "+", rhs_space)
)

m_broadleaf_1 <- gam(f_broadleaf_1, data = broadleaf_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_broadleaf_2 <- gam(f_broadleaf_2, data = broadleaf_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_broadleaf_3 <- gam(f_broadleaf_3, data = broadleaf_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_broadleaf_4 <- gam(f_broadleaf_4, data = broadleaf_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_broadleaf_5 <- gam(f_broadleaf_5, data = broadleaf_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")

extract_dist_info <- function(mod, model_name) {
  sm <- summary(mod)
  s_tab <- as.data.frame(sm$s.table)
  s_tab$term <- rownames(s_tab)

  dist_row <- s_tab %>%
    filter(str_detect(term, "dist_to_current_m"))

  tibble(
    model = model_name,
    n = nrow(mod$model),
    dev_expl = sm$dev.expl,
    dist_edf = if (nrow(dist_row) > 0) dist_row$edf[1] else NA_real_,
    dist_p = if (nrow(dist_row) > 0) dist_row$`p-value`[1] else NA_real_
  )
}

broadleaf_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  extract_dist_info(m_broadleaf_1, "distance only"),
  extract_dist_info(m_broadleaf_2, "distance + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_broadleaf_3, "distance + covariates"),
  extract_dist_info(m_broadleaf_4, "distance + covariates + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_broadleaf_5, "covariates + space (no distance)")
)

broadleaf_model_summary
summary(m_broadleaf_4)

drop_one_term_broadleaf <- function(term_to_drop, dat, preds) {
  base_terms <- c(
    "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
    preds,
    "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
  )

  keep_terms <- base_terms[base_terms != term_to_drop]

  f_drop <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "cbind(broadleaf_abundance, other_abundance) ~",
      paste(keep_terms, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  mod_drop <- gam(
    f_drop,
    data = dat,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  tibble(
    dropped_term = term_to_drop,
    dev_expl_drop = summary(mod_drop)$dev.expl
  )
}

broadleaf_full_dev <- summary(m_broadleaf_4)$dev.expl

broadleaf_terms_to_test <- c(
  "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
  broadleaf_preds,
  "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
)

broadleaf_drop_importance <- map_dfr(
  broadleaf_terms_to_test,
  ~ drop_one_term_broadleaf(.x, broadleaf_dat, broadleaf_preds)
) %>%
  mutate(
    full_dev_expl = broadleaf_full_dev,
    delta_dev_expl = full_dev_expl - dev_expl_drop
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(delta_dev_expl))

broadleaf_drop_importance
#-----------------------------
# build grass point table
#-----------------------------
grass_dat <- type_point %>%
  filter(type == "Grass") %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(point_env, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(
    grass_abundance = as.numeric(type_abundance),
    other_abundance = as.numeric(total_abundance - type_abundance),
    grass_prop = grass_abundance / total_abundance
  ) %>%
  filter(
    total_abundance >= 3,
    !is.na(dist_to_current_m),
    !is.na(x_utm),
    !is.na(y_utm)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(
      grass_abundance, other_abundance, total_abundance,
      dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm,
      any_of(full_trait_preds)
    ), as.numeric)
  )

grass_dat %>%
  summarise(
    rho = cor(
      dist_to_current_m,
      topographic_wetness_index_usgs,
      method = "spearman",
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
    )
  )

grass_preds <- intersect(full_trait_preds, names(grass_dat))

rhs_covars_grass <- paste(grass_preds, collapse = " + ")

f_grass_1 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist)
)

f_grass_2 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_grass_3 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars_grass)
)

f_grass_4 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars_grass, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_grass_5 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_covars_grass, "+", rhs_space)
)

m_grass_1 <- gam(f_grass_1, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_2 <- gam(f_grass_2, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_3 <- gam(f_grass_3, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_4 <- gam(f_grass_4, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_5 <- gam(f_grass_5, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")

grass_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_1, "distance only"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_2, "distance + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_3, "distance + covariates"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_4, "distance + covariates + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_5, "covariates + space (no distance)")
)

grass_model_summary
summary(m_grass_4)
#-----------------------------
# build grass point table
#-----------------------------
grass_dat <- type_point %>%
  filter(type == "Grass") %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(point_env, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(
    grass_abundance = as.numeric(type_abundance),
    other_abundance = as.numeric(total_abundance - type_abundance),
    grass_prop = grass_abundance / total_abundance
  ) %>%
  filter(
    total_abundance >= 3,
    !is.na(dist_to_current_m),
    !is.na(x_utm),
    !is.na(y_utm)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(
      grass_abundance, other_abundance, total_abundance,
      dist_to_current_m, x_utm, y_utm,
      any_of(full_trait_preds)
    ), as.numeric)
  )

grass_dat %>%
  summarise(
    rho = cor(
      dist_to_current_m,
      topographic_wetness_index_usgs,
      method = "spearman",
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
    )
  )

grass_preds <- intersect(full_trait_preds, names(grass_dat))

rhs_covars_grass <- paste(grass_preds, collapse = " + ")

f_grass_1 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist)
)

f_grass_2 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_grass_3 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars_grass)
)

f_grass_4 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_dist, "+", rhs_covars_grass, "+", rhs_space)
)

f_grass_5 <- as.formula(
  paste("cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~", rhs_covars_grass, "+", rhs_space)
)

m_grass_1 <- gam(f_grass_1, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_2 <- gam(f_grass_2, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_3 <- gam(f_grass_3, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_4 <- gam(f_grass_4, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")
m_grass_5 <- gam(f_grass_5, data = grass_dat, family = quasibinomial(), method = "REML")

grass_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_1, "distance only"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_2, "distance + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_3, "distance + covariates"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_4, "distance + covariates + space"),
  extract_dist_info(m_grass_5, "covariates + space (no distance)")
)

grass_model_summary
summary(m_grass_4)
#sort broadleaf and grass model summaries by deviance explained and plot
broadleaf_model_summary <- broadleaf_model_summary %>%
  arrange(dev_expl) 
grass_model_summary <- grass_model_summary %>%
  arrange(dev_expl)
ggplot(broadleaf_model_summary, aes(x = model, y = dev_expl)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Broadleaf model comparison",
    subtitle = "Deviance explained across nested GAMs",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Deviance explained"
  )

ggplot(grass_model_summary, aes(x = model, y = dev_expl)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Grass model comparison",
    subtitle = "Deviance explained across nested GAMs",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Deviance explained"
  )

broadleaf_drop_importance <- broadleaf_drop_importance %>%
  mutate(
    term_label = case_when(
      dropped_term == "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)" ~ "Distance to disturbance",
      dropped_term == "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)" ~ "Spatial smooth",
      dropped_term == "p_h_2" ~ "pH",
      dropped_term == "p" ~ "P",
      dropped_term == "k" ~ "K",
      dropped_term == "ca" ~ "Ca",
      dropped_term == "mg" ~ "Mg",
      dropped_term == "mn" ~ "Mn",
      dropped_term == "zn" ~ "Zn",
      dropped_term == "elevation" ~ "Elevation",
      dropped_term == "slope" ~ "Slope",
      dropped_term == "aspect" ~ "Aspect",
      dropped_term == "curvature" ~ "Curvature",
      dropped_term == "topographic_wetness_index_usgs" ~ "Topographic wetness",
      dropped_term == "topographic_position_index" ~ "Topographic position",
      dropped_term == "flow_accumulation_usgs" ~ "Flow accumulation",
      dropped_term == "stream_power_index" ~ "Stream power",
      dropped_term == "vertical_distance_to_channel_network" ~ "Vertical distance to channel",
      dropped_term == "ndvi_sept_2022" ~ "NDVI (Sept 2022)",
      TRUE ~ dropped_term
    )
  )

ggplot(
  broadleaf_drop_importance,
  aes(x = reorder(term_label, delta_dev_expl), y = delta_dev_expl)
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Broadleaf predictor importance",
    subtitle = "Decrease in deviance explained when each term is removed",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Decrease in deviance explained"
  )
drop_one_term_grass <- function(term_to_drop, dat, preds) {
  base_terms <- c(
    "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
    preds,
    "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
  )

  keep_terms <- base_terms[base_terms != term_to_drop]

  f_drop <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~",
      paste(keep_terms, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  mod_drop <- gam(
    f_drop,
    data = dat,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  tibble(
    dropped_term = term_to_drop,
    dev_expl_drop = summary(mod_drop)$dev.expl
  )
}

grass_full_dev <- summary(m_grass_4)$dev.expl

grass_terms_to_test <- c(
  "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
  grass_preds,
  "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
)

grass_drop_importance <- map_dfr(
  grass_terms_to_test,
  ~ drop_one_term_grass(.x, grass_dat, grass_preds)
) %>%
  mutate(
    full_dev_expl = grass_full_dev,
    delta_dev_expl = full_dev_expl - dev_expl_drop
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(delta_dev_expl))

grass_drop_importance
drop_one_term_grass <- function(term_to_drop, dat, preds) {
  base_terms <- c(
    "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
    preds,
    "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
  )

  keep_terms <- base_terms[base_terms != term_to_drop]

  f_drop <- as.formula(
    paste(
      "cbind(grass_abundance, other_abundance) ~",
      paste(keep_terms, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  mod_drop <- gam(
    f_drop,
    data = dat,
    family = quasibinomial(),
    method = "REML"
  )

  tibble(
    dropped_term = term_to_drop,
    dev_expl_drop = summary(mod_drop)$dev.expl
  )
}

grass_full_dev <- summary(m_grass_4)$dev.expl

grass_terms_to_test <- c(
  "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
  grass_preds,
  "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)"
)

grass_drop_importance <- map_dfr(
  grass_terms_to_test,
  ~ drop_one_term_grass(.x, grass_dat, grass_preds)
) %>%
  mutate(
    full_dev_expl = grass_full_dev,
    delta_dev_expl = full_dev_expl - dev_expl_drop
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(delta_dev_expl))

grass_drop_importance
grass_drop_importance <- grass_drop_importance %>%
  mutate(
    term_label = case_when(
      dropped_term == "s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)" ~ "Distance to disturbance",
      dropped_term == "s(x_utm, y_utm, k = 15)" ~ "Spatial smooth",
      dropped_term == "p_h_2" ~ "pH",
      dropped_term == "p" ~ "P",
      dropped_term == "k" ~ "K",
      dropped_term == "ca" ~ "Ca",
      dropped_term == "mg" ~ "Mg",
      dropped_term == "mn" ~ "Mn",
      dropped_term == "zn" ~ "Zn",
      dropped_term == "elevation" ~ "Elevation",
      dropped_term == "slope" ~ "Slope",
      dropped_term == "aspect" ~ "Aspect",
      dropped_term == "curvature" ~ "Curvature",
      dropped_term == "topographic_wetness_index_usgs" ~ "Topographic wetness",
      dropped_term == "topographic_position_index" ~ "Topographic position",
      dropped_term == "flow_accumulation_usgs" ~ "Flow accumulation",
      dropped_term == "stream_power_index" ~ "Stream power",
      dropped_term == "vertical_distance_to_channel_network" ~ "Vertical distance to channel",
      dropped_term == "ndvi_sept_2022" ~ "NDVI (Sept 2022)",
      TRUE ~ dropped_term
    )
  )

ggplot(
  grass_drop_importance,
  aes(x = reorder(term_label, delta_dev_expl), y = delta_dev_expl)
) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Grass predictor importance",
    subtitle = "Decrease in deviance explained when each term is removed",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Decrease in deviance explained"
  )
# Broadleaves
  # 
  # Top terms are:
    # 
    # spatial smooth
    # NDVI
    # P
    # distance to disturbance
    # wetness
  # 
  # This makes broadleaves look more spatially patchy and more tied to vegetation/wetness/fertility context.
# Grasses
  # 
  # Top terms were:
    # 
    # Mg
    # distance to disturbance
    # topographic position
    # NDVI
  # 
  # This made grasses look more tied to measured soil/terrain gradients and disturbance.

  # Grasses appear to be more strongly associated with measured soil chemical and terrain-position gradients, whereas broadleaves retain a stronger residual spatial pattern and are more influenced by NDVI, P, and wetness-related variables.

#-----------------------------
# helper: partial prediction
#-----------------------------
make_partial_pred <- function(mod, dat, focal_var, grid_n = 200) {
  newdat <- dat[rep(1, grid_n), , drop = FALSE]

  for (nm in names(newdat)) {
    if (is.numeric(newdat[[nm]])) {
      newdat[[nm]] <- median(dat[[nm]], na.rm = TRUE)
    }
  }

  newdat[[focal_var]] <- seq(
    min(dat[[focal_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
    max(dat[[focal_var]], na.rm = TRUE),
    length.out = grid_n
  )

  pr <- predict(mod, newdata = newdat, type = "link", se.fit = TRUE)

  tibble(
    x = newdat[[focal_var]],
    fit = plogis(pr$fit),
    lower = plogis(pr$fit - 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
    upper = plogis(pr$fit + 1.96 * pr$se.fit),
    variable = focal_var
  )
}

#-----------------------------
# prediction data
#-----------------------------
broadleaf_dist_pred <- make_partial_pred(
  m_broadleaf_4,
  broadleaf_dat,
  "dist_to_current_m"
)

#-----------------------------
# label from smooth table
#-----------------------------
broadleaf_sum <- summary(m_broadleaf_4)
broadleaf_smooth_terms <- rownames(broadleaf_sum$s.table)
broadleaf_dist_row <- which(str_detect(broadleaf_smooth_terms, "dist_to_current_m"))

broadleaf_dist_lab <- if (length(broadleaf_dist_row) == 1) {
  paste0(
    "edf = ", round(broadleaf_sum$s.table[broadleaf_dist_row, "edf"], 2),
    "\np = ", signif(broadleaf_sum$s.table[broadleaf_dist_row, "p-value"], 3)
  )
} else {
  NULL
}

#-----------------------------
# theme
#-----------------------------
theme_trait <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0),
    legend.position = "none"
  )

#-----------------------------
# broadleaf plot
#-----------------------------
p_broadleaf_dist <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = broadleaf_dat,
    aes(x = dist_to_current_m, y = broadleaf_prop),
    alpha = 0.15,
    size = 1.5,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.8, height = 0.003)
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = broadleaf_dist_pred,
    aes(x = x, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    alpha = 0.22
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = broadleaf_dist_pred,
    aes(x = x, y = fit),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, NA),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Broadleaf response to distance from disturbance",
    subtitle = "Adjusted partial effect from full GAM",
    x = "Distance to disturbance (m)",
    y = "Predicted broadleaf proportion"
  ) +
  theme_trait

if (!is.null(broadleaf_dist_lab)) {
  p_broadleaf_dist <- p_broadleaf_dist +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = Inf, y = Inf,
      label = broadleaf_dist_lab,
      hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4, size = 4
    )
}

p_broadleaf_dist

#-----------------------------
# prediction data
#-----------------------------
grass_dist_pred <- make_partial_pred(
  m_grass_4,
  grass_dat,
  "dist_to_current_m"
)

#-----------------------------
# label from smooth table
#-----------------------------
grass_sum <- summary(m_grass_4)
grass_smooth_terms <- rownames(grass_sum$s.table)
grass_dist_row <- which(str_detect(grass_smooth_terms, "dist_to_current_m"))

grass_dist_lab <- if (length(grass_dist_row) == 1) {
  paste0(
    "edf = ", round(grass_sum$s.table[grass_dist_row, "edf"], 2),
    "\np = ", signif(grass_sum$s.table[grass_dist_row, "p-value"], 3)
  )
} else {
  NULL
}

#-----------------------------
# grass plot
#-----------------------------
p_grass_dist <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = grass_dat,
    aes(x = dist_to_current_m, y = grass_prop),
    alpha = 0.15,
    size = 1.5,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.8, height = 0.003)
  ) +
  geom_ribbon(
    data = grass_dist_pred,
    aes(x = x, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    alpha = 0.22
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = grass_dist_pred,
    aes(x = x, y = fit),
    linewidth = 1.1
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, NA),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Grass response to distance from disturbance",
    subtitle = "Adjusted partial effect from full GAM",
    x = "Distance to disturbance (m)",
    y = "Predicted grass proportion"
  ) +
  theme_trait

if (!is.null(grass_dist_lab)) {
  p_grass_dist <- p_grass_dist +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = Inf, y = Inf,
      label = grass_dist_lab,
      hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.4, size = 4
    )
}

p_grass_dist

# Broadleaves: distance to disturbance matters, and the response is curved. 
#Grasses: distance to disturbance may show some curvature, but it is not strong enough to call significant after accounting for the other predictors.

# broadleaf proportion = share of all weeds that are broadleaves
# grass proportion = share of all weeds that are grasses
# sedge proportion = share of all weeds that are sedges
```
#### Morans I 

```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(spdep)

weed_idx_sf <- analysis_dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_utm), !is.na(y_utm)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x_utm", "y_utm"),
           crs = st_crs(soil_pts_utm),
           remove = FALSE)

idx_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "dist_to_current_m",
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
    "elevation",
    "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "topographic_position_index",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(weed_idx_sf)
)

idx_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "dist_to_current_m",
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
    "elevation",
    "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "topographic_position_index",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(weed_idx_sf)
)

library(mgcv)

shannon_dat <- weed_idx_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(shannon_weiner_diversity_index, x_utm, y_utm, any_of(idx_preds)) %>%
  drop_na()

shannon_form <- as.formula(
  paste(
    "shannon_weiner_diversity_index ~",
    paste(
      c("s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)",
        idx_preds[idx_preds != "dist_to_current_m"]),
      collapse = " + "
    )
  )
)

m_shannon <- gam(
  shannon_form,
  data = shannon_dat,
  method = "REML"
)

summary(m_shannon)


coords <- shannon_dat %>% select(x_utm, y_utm)

nb <- knearneigh(coords, k = 8) %>%
  knn2nb()

lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W")

moran.test(residuals(m_shannon), lw)

moran.test(shannon_dat$shannon_weiner_diversity_index, lw)
moran.test(residuals(m_shannon), lw)

local_shannon <- localmoran(shannon_dat$shannon_weiner_diversity_index, lw)
head(local_shannon)

library(gstat)

# example response: Shannon
shannon_sf <- analysis_dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(x_utm), !is.na(y_utm), !is.na(shannon_weiner_diversity_index)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x_utm", "y_utm"), crs = st_crs(soil_pts_utm))

# empirical variogram
vg_emp <- variogram(shannon_weiner_diversity_index ~ 1, shannon_sf)

# fit model (try Exp, Sph, Gau if needed)
vg_fit <- fit.variogram(
  vg_emp,
  vgm(psill = 0.02, model = "Exp", nugget = 0.01, range = 100)
)

vg_line <- variogramLine(vg_fit, maxdist = max(vg_emp$dist), n = 200) %>%
  as_tibble()

# extract metrics
vg_params <- as.data.frame(vg_fit)

nugget_val <- vg_params %>%
  filter(model == "Nug") %>%
  summarise(val = sum(psill, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(val)

partial_sill_val <- vg_params %>%
  filter(model != "Nug") %>%
  summarise(val = sum(psill, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(val)

total_sill_val <- nugget_val + partial_sill_val

range_val <- vg_params %>%
  filter(model != "Nug") %>%
  summarise(val = max(range, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(val)

nugget_ratio <- nugget_val / total_sill_val

vg_label <- paste0(
  "Nugget = ", round(nugget_val, 3),
  "\nPartial sill = ", round(partial_sill_val, 3),
  "\nTotal sill = ", round(total_sill_val, 3),
  "\nRange = ", round(range_val, 1),
  "\nNugget:sill ratio = ", round(nugget_ratio, 2)
)

ggplot(vg_emp, aes(x = dist, y = gamma)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_line(data = vg_line, aes(x = dist, y = gamma), linewidth = 1) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label = vg_label,
    hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.1, size = 4
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "Variogram of Shannon diversity",
    subtitle = "Empirical semivariance with fitted variogram model",
    x = "Distance",
    y = "Semivariance"
  )

# example GAM first
idx_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "dist_to_current_m",
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
    "elevation", "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "topographic_position_index",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(analysis_dat)
)

shannon_dat <- analysis_dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(shannon_weiner_diversity_index), !is.na(x_utm), !is.na(y_utm)) %>%
  select(shannon_weiner_diversity_index, x_utm, y_utm, any_of(idx_preds)) %>%
  drop_na()

shannon_form <- as.formula(
  paste(
    "shannon_weiner_diversity_index ~",
    paste(
      c("s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)", idx_preds[idx_preds != "dist_to_current_m"]),
      collapse = " + "
    )
  )
)

m_shannon <- mgcv::gam(shannon_form, data = shannon_dat, method = "REML")

shannon_resid_sf <- shannon_dat %>%
  mutate(resid = residuals(m_shannon)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x_utm", "y_utm"), crs = st_crs(soil_pts_utm))


# empirical residual variogram
vg_emp_resid <- variogram(resid ~ 1, shannon_resid_sf)

# inspect empirical variogram first
vg_emp_resid
plot(vg_emp_resid)

# rough starting values from the empirical variogram
start_nugget <- min(vg_emp_resid$gamma, na.rm = TRUE)
start_psill  <- max(vg_emp_resid$gamma, na.rm = TRUE) - start_nugget
start_range  <- max(vg_emp_resid$dist, na.rm = TRUE) / 3

# try a few common models
vgm_start_exp <- vgm(psill = start_psill, model = "Exp", nugget = start_nugget, range = start_range)
vgm_start_sph <- vgm(psill = start_psill, model = "Sph", nugget = start_nugget, range = start_range)
vgm_start_gau <- vgm(psill = start_psill, model = "Gau", nugget = start_nugget, range = start_range)

fit_exp <- try(fit.variogram(vg_emp_resid, vgm_start_exp), silent = TRUE)
fit_sph <- try(fit.variogram(vg_emp_resid, vgm_start_sph), silent = TRUE)
fit_gau <- try(fit.variogram(vg_emp_resid, vgm_start_gau), silent = TRUE)

fit_exp
fit_sph
fit_gau
# SHANNON: The empirical variogram suggested residual spatial dependence at short distances. A spherical model provided a reasonable summary, with an estimated range of approximately 103 m and little fitted nugget variance.
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(sf)
library(gstat)
library(mgcv)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)

fit_resid_variogram <- function(dat, response, preds, crs_obj) {

  keep_cols <- c(response, "x_utm", "y_utm", preds)

  d <- dat %>%
    select(any_of(keep_cols)) %>%
    drop_na()

  form <- as.formula(
    paste(
      response, "~",
      paste(
        c("s(dist_to_current_m, k = 4)", preds[preds != "dist_to_current_m"]),
        collapse = " + "
      )
    )
  )

  mod <- gam(form, data = d, method = "REML")

  d_sf <- d %>%
    mutate(resid = residuals(mod)) %>%
    st_as_sf(coords = c("x_utm", "y_utm"), crs = crs_obj)

  vg_emp <- variogram(resid ~ 1, d_sf)

  start_nugget <- min(vg_emp$gamma, na.rm = TRUE)
  start_psill  <- max(vg_emp$gamma, na.rm = TRUE) - start_nugget
  start_range  <- max(vg_emp$dist, na.rm = TRUE) / 3

  starts <- list(
    Exp = vgm(psill = start_psill, model = "Exp", nugget = start_nugget, range = start_range),
    Sph = vgm(psill = start_psill, model = "Sph", nugget = start_nugget, range = start_range),
    Gau = vgm(psill = start_psill, model = "Gau", nugget = start_nugget, range = start_range)
  )

  fits <- map(starts, ~ try(fit.variogram(vg_emp, .x), silent = TRUE))

  get_sse <- function(v) {
    if (inherits(v, "try-error")) return(Inf)
    attr(v, "SSErr")
  }

  fit_tbl <- tibble(
    model = names(fits),
    SSErr = map_dbl(fits, get_sse)
  ) %>%
    arrange(SSErr)

  best_name <- fit_tbl$model[1]
  best_fit <- fits[[best_name]]

  params <- as.data.frame(best_fit)

  nugget_val <- params %>%
    filter(model == "Nug") %>%
    summarise(val = sum(psill, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    pull(val)

  partial_sill_val <- params %>%
    filter(model != "Nug") %>%
    summarise(val = sum(psill, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    pull(val)

  total_sill_val <- nugget_val + partial_sill_val

  range_val <- params %>%
    filter(model != "Nug") %>%
    summarise(val = max(range, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    pull(val)

  nugget_ratio <- ifelse(total_sill_val > 0, nugget_val / total_sill_val, NA_real_)

  list(
    model = mod,
    empirical = vg_emp,
    best_fit = best_fit,
    fit_table = fit_tbl,
    metrics = tibble(
      response = response,
      best_model = best_name,
      nugget = nugget_val,
      partial_sill = partial_sill_val,
      total_sill = total_sill_val,
      range = range_val,
      nugget_ratio = nugget_ratio,
      dev_expl = summary(mod)$dev.expl
    )
  )
}

idx_preds <- intersect(
  c(
    "dist_to_current_m",
    "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
    "elevation",
    "slope",
    "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
    "topographic_position_index",
    "flow_accumulation_usgs",
    "ndvi_sept_2022"
  ),
  names(analysis_dat)
)

vg_simpson <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_dat,
  response = "simpsons_diversity_index",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_simpson$metrics

vg_shannon <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_dat,
  response = "shannon_weiner_diversity_index",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_shannon$metrics

vg_evenness <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_dat,
  response = "pielous_evenness_index",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_evenness$metrics

vg_evenness <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_dat,
  response = "pielous_evenness_index",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_evenness$metrics
```

```{r}
type_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(type), type != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, type) %>%
  summarise(type_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

point_totals_type <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

type_props <- type_point %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(prop = type_abundance / total_abundance) %>%
  select(row_num, type, prop) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = type, values_from = prop, values_fill = 0, names_prefix = "prop_")
analysis_types <- analysis_dat %>%
  left_join(type_props, by = "row_num")

vg_broadleaf <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_types,
  response = "prop_Broadleaf",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_broadleaf$metrics

vg_grass <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_types,
  response = "prop_Grass",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_grass$metrics

vg_sedge <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_types,
  response = "prop_Sedge",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_sedge$metrics

season_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(season), season != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, season) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = season,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "season_"
  ) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

analysis_season <- analysis_dat %>%
  left_join(season_point, by = "row_num")
# 
# vg_warm <- fit_resid_variogram(
#   dat = analysis_season,
#   response = "prop_Warm",
#   preds = idx_preds,
#   crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
# )
# 
# vg_cool <- fit_resid_variogram(
#   dat = analysis_season,
#   response = "prop_Cool",
#   preds = idx_preds,
#   crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
# )
# 
# bind_rows(vg_warm$metrics, vg_cool$metrics)

life_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_cycle), life_cycle != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, life_cycle) %>%
  summarise(life_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(prop = life_abundance / total_abundance) %>%
  select(row_num, life_cycle, prop) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = life_cycle, values_from = prop, values_fill = 0, names_prefix = "prop_")

analysis_life <- analysis_dat %>%
  left_join(life_point, by = "row_num")

vg_annual <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_life,
  response = "prop_Annual",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_perennial <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_life,
  response = "prop_Perennial",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

bind_rows(vg_annual$metrics, vg_perennial$metrics)

family_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(family), family != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, family) %>%
  summarise(family_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  left_join(point_totals_type, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(prop = family_abundance / total_abundance)

cyper_prop <- family_point %>%
  filter(family == "Cyperaceae") %>%
  select(row_num, prop) %>%
  rename(prop_Cyperaceae = prop)

analysis_family <- analysis_dat %>%
  left_join(cyper_prop, by = "row_num")

vg_cyperaceae <- fit_resid_variogram(
  dat = analysis_family,
  response = "prop_Cyperaceae",
  preds = idx_preds,
  crs_obj = st_crs(soil_pts_utm)
)

vg_cyperaceae$metrics

plot_variogram_with_metrics <- function(vg_obj, title_text) {
  vg_line <- variogramLine(vg_obj$best_fit, maxdist = max(vg_obj$empirical$dist), n = 200) %>%
    as_tibble()

  m <- vg_obj$metrics

  vg_label <- paste0(
    "Model = ", m$best_model,
    "\nNugget = ", round(m$nugget, 3),
    "\nPartial sill = ", round(m$partial_sill, 3),
    "\nTotal sill = ", round(m$total_sill, 3),
    "\nRange = ", round(m$range, 1),
    "\nNugget:sill ratio = ", round(m$nugget_ratio, 2),
    "\nDeviance explained = ", round(m$dev_expl, 3)
  )

  ggplot(vg_obj$empirical, aes(x = dist, y = gamma)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_line(data = vg_line, aes(x = dist, y = gamma), linewidth = 1) +
    annotate(
      "text", x = Inf, y = Inf,
      label = vg_label, hjust = 1.05, vjust = 1.1, size = 4
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    labs(
      title = title_text,
      x = "Distance",
      y = "Semivariance"
    )
}

plot_variogram_with_metrics(vg_shannon, "Residual variogram: Shannon diversity")
plot_variogram_with_metrics(vg_broadleaf, "Residual variogram: Broadleaf proportion")
plot_variogram_with_metrics(vg_grass, "Residual variogram: Grass proportion")
plot_variogram_with_metrics(vg_sedge, "Residual variogram: Sedge proportion")
#plot_variogram_with_metrics(vg_warm, "Residual variogram: Warm-season proportion")
```

#### UMAP of weed community composition

```{r}


species_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_species), weed_species != "", !is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, weed_species) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = weed_species,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "sp_"
  )
family_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(family), family != "", !is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, family) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = family,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "fam_"
  )
genus_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(genus), genus != "", !is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, genus) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = genus,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "gen_"
  )
type_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(type), type != "", !is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, type) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "type_"
  )

season_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(season), season != "", !is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, season) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = season,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "season_"
  )

life_cycle_wide <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_cycle), life_cycle != "", !is.na(weed_count)) %>%
  group_by(row_num, life_cycle) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = life_cycle,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "life_"
  )

weed_umap_tbl <- species_wide %>%
  full_join(family_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  full_join(genus_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  full_join(type_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  full_join(season_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  full_join(life_cycle_wide, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(across(-row_num, ~ replace_na(.x, 0)))
weed_env_umap_tbl <- weed_umap_tbl %>%
  left_join(
    point_env %>%
      st_drop_geometry() %>%
      select(
        row_num,
        dist_to_current_m,
        p_h_2, p, k, ca, mg, mn, zn,
        elevation,
        slope,
        topographic_wetness_index_usgs,
        topographic_position_index,
        flow_accumulation_usgs,
        stream_power_index,
        vertical_distance_to_channel_network,
        ndvi_sept_2022
      ),
    by = "row_num"
  )

weed_cols <- grep("^(sp_|fam_|gen_|type_|season_|life_)", names(weed_env_umap_tbl), value = TRUE)

weed_env_umap_tbl <- weed_env_umap_tbl %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(weed_cols), ~ replace_na(.x, 0)))
library(vegan)

weed_block <- weed_env_umap_tbl %>%
  select(all_of(weed_cols)) %>%
  as.data.frame()

weed_block_hell <- decostand(weed_block, method = "hellinger")

env_cols <- c(
  "dist_to_current_m",
  "p_h_2", "p", "k", "ca", "mg", "mn", "zn",
  "elevation",
  "slope",
  "topographic_wetness_index_usgs",
  "topographic_position_index",
  "flow_accumulation_usgs",
  "stream_power_index",
  "vertical_distance_to_channel_network",
  "ndvi_sept_2022"
)

env_block <- weed_env_umap_tbl %>%
  select(any_of(env_cols))

umap_input <- bind_cols(
  as_tibble(weed_block_hell),
  env_block
) %>%
  drop_na()

umap_ids <- weed_env_umap_tbl %>%
  select(row_num) %>%
  slice(as.numeric(rownames(umap_input)))

umap_scaled <- scale(umap_input)
umap_joined <- bind_cols(
  weed_env_umap_tbl %>% select(row_num),
  as_tibble(weed_block_hell),
  env_block
) %>%
  drop_na()

umap_ids <- umap_joined %>% select(row_num)
umap_scaled <- umap_joined %>% select(-row_num) %>% scale()
library(uwot)

set.seed(123)

umap_out <- umap(
  umap_scaled,
  n_neighbors = 15,
  min_dist = 0.1,
  metric = "euclidean"
)

umap_df <- bind_cols(
  umap_ids,
  as_tibble(umap_out, .name_repair = ~ c("UMAP1", "UMAP2"))
)
library(dbscan)

hdb <- hdbscan(umap_out, minPts = 8)
umap_df$cluster <- factor(hdb$cluster)

#plot umap w hdbscan
ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  labs(
    title = "UMAP of weed community composition and environment",
    subtitle = "Colored by HDBSCAN cluster"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "right")
```

```{r}
#spatial significances 

# total abundance per point
point_totals <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num) %>%
  summarise(total_abundance = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# life cycle
life_cycle_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_cycle), life_cycle != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, life_cycle) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = life_cycle,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "life_"
  )

# season
season_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(season), season != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, season) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = season,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "season_"
  )

# type
type_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(type), type != "", !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  group_by(row_num, type) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = type,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "type_"
  )

trait_combo_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(life_cycle), !is.na(type), life_cycle != "", type != "",
         !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  mutate(combo = paste(life_cycle, type, sep = "_")) %>%
  group_by(row_num, combo) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = combo,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "combo_"
  )

season_type_point <- weed_trait_long %>%
  filter(!is.na(season), !is.na(type), season != "", type != "",
         !is.na(weed_count), weed_count > 0) %>%
  mutate(combo = paste(season, type, sep = "_")) %>%
  group_by(row_num, combo) %>%
  summarise(abund = sum(weed_count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = combo,
    values_from = abund,
    values_fill = 0,
    names_prefix = "combo_"
  )

trait_predictors <- point_totals %>%
  left_join(life_cycle_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(season_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(type_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(trait_combo_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  left_join(season_type_point, by = "row_num") %>%
  mutate(across(-row_num, ~ replace_na(.x, 0)))

idx_trait_dat <- analysis_dat %>%
  select(
    row_num,
    simpsons_diversity_index,
    shannon_weiner_diversity_index,
    pielous_evenness_index,
    berger_parker_dominance_index
  ) %>%
  distinct(row_num, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  left_join(trait_predictors, by = "row_num")

trait_preds_basic <- intersect(
  c(
    "life_Annual", "life_Perennial",
    "season_Cool", "season_Warm",
    "type_Broadleaf", "type_Grass", "type_Sedge"
  ),
  names(idx_trait_dat)
)

trait_preds_combo1 <- names(idx_trait_dat) %>%
  str_subset("^combo_(Annual|Perennial)_")

trait_preds_combo2 <- names(idx_trait_dat) %>%
  str_subset("^combo_(Cool|Warm)_")

trait_preds_all <- unique(c(
  trait_preds_basic,
  trait_preds_combo1,
  trait_preds_combo2
))

library(mgcv)


fit_idx_trait_gam <- function(dat, response, preds) {

  d <- dat %>%
    select(any_of(c(response, preds))) %>%
    drop_na()

  if (nrow(d) < 30) return(NULL)

  form <- as.formula(
    paste(response, "~", paste(preds, collapse = " + "))
  )

  gam(form, data = d, method = "REML")
}

drop_one_term_idx <- function(term_to_drop, dat, response, preds) {
```
